TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 'niyat == bnkis ta lela ga, ungat iwan "makuy, gang, payat ro'iy" mga'in. nya. micu ga, ana nanu na mga'in ga nya mhtuw kwara la. mlux ma kaca? lungun muga, kya myasa ci s'yanux ta micu, ro piyux ci nni'un ta, iwan: "gyus yapiy, bolung, 'cyux", twangn mnbuw ta uwow lwey, mbusuk ro swagan laga, si abi kryax, ini piyiy, ro m'elang musa mtiyow, yaca kya, baha inu mhtuw kya kwara yihul mga'in ta la?
S.PHON: == Ēnijat == ő≤nkis~…ē ta lela …£a, uŇčat iwan "makuj, …£aŇč, pajat ro Ēij" m…£a Ēin. nja. mi ¶~ ®u …£a, ana nanu na m…£a Ēin …£a nja mńßtuw kwara la. mlux ma ka ¶~ ®a? luŇčun mu…£a, kja mjas~…ēa ¶~ ®i s~…ē Ējanux ta mi ¶~ ®u, ro pijux ¶~ ®i nni Ēun ta, iwan: "…£jus~…ē japij, ő≤oluŇč, Ē ¶~ ®jux", twaŇčn mnő≤uw ta uwow lwej, mő≤us~…ēuk ro s~…ēwa…£an la…£a, s~…ēi aő≤i krjax, ini pijij, ro m ĒelaŇč mus~…ēa mtijow, ja ¶~ ®a kja, ő≤ańßa inu mńßtuw kja kwara jińßul m…£a Ēin ta la?
S.FORM: == 'niyat == bnkis ta lela ga, ungat iwan "makuy, gang, payat ro'iy" mga'in. nya. micu ga, ana nanu na mga'in ga nya mhtuw kwara la. mlux ma kaca? lungun muga, kya myasa ci s'yanux ta micu, ro piyux ci nni'un ta, iwan: "gyus yapiy, bolung, 'cyux", twangn mnbuw ta uwow lwey, mbusuk ro swagan laga, si abi kryax, ini piyiy, ro m'elang musa mtiyow, yaca kya, baha inu mhtuw kya kwara yihul mga'in ta la?
S.PHON: == Ēnijat == ő≤nkis~…ē ta lela …£a, uŇčat iwan "makuj, …£aŇč, pajat ro Ēij" m…£a Ēin. nja. mi ¶~ ®u …£a, ana nanu na m…£a Ēin …£a nja mńßtuw kwara la. mlux ma ka ¶~ ®a? luŇčun mu…£a, kja mjas~…ēa ¶~ ®i s~…ē Ējanux ta mi ¶~ ®u, ro pijux ¶~ ®i nni Ēun ta, iwan: "…£jus~…ē japij, ő≤oluŇč, Ē ¶~ ®jux", twaŇčn mnő≤uw ta uwow lwej, mő≤us~…ēuk ro s~…ēwa…£an la…£a, s~…ēi aő≤i krjax, ini pijij, ro m ĒelaŇč mus~…ēa mtijow, ja ¶~ ®a kja, ő≤ańßa inu mńßtuw kja kwara jińßul m…£a Ēin ta la?
